test.command: go test ./... -count=1 -p 4 && cd frontend && pnpm exec playwright test --workers=1

lint.command: go vet ./... && cd frontend && pnpm build

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Always run Playwright tests with the `--workers=1` flag to ensure serialized execution and prevent database contention.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker ran Playwright tests without the `--workers=1` flag in frontend-auth-entry-ui.
